command: Use the repo skill review-loop to handle this task end-to-end in review-only mode: review the existing Codex Stage 1 README.md wording about executor_model and codex_executor_model, treat the current tree as already implemented, copy REVIEW_TARGET_SMOKE_TOKEN verbatim into the ## Review Target section, and do not make new edits unless the reviewer finds a real defect. The first round should be reviewer-only, and because skip_quality_polish is enabled in config, the run must still mint polish as a no-op completion and continue through docs + security + delivery instead of collapsing to exec-only delivery.
